name: Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S.
summary: Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S. produces and sells meat and by-products of cattle, sheep, poultry, and fish under the Pinar brand in Turkey. It offers delicatessen products, including soudjouks, salamis, sausages, hams, smoked meats, roasted meat products, and pastramis; frozen meat products, such as burgers, meatballs, doners, and breaded meat products; and frozen dough products comprising pizzas, puff pastries, mantis, boreks, and boyoz products. The company also provides frozen seafood products consisting of shrimps, sliced squids, and breaded seafood products, as well as anchovy, sardine, and haddock products; and unprocessed meat products, such as unprocessed turkey, beef, and lamb products. It serves hotels, restaurants, catering companies, and schools. The company also exports its products. Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Izmir, Turkey. Pinar Entegre Et ve Un Sanayii A.S. is a subsidiary of Yasar Holding A.S.
